title: The Morning Croak — 08 July 2026
excerpt: GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna drops Thursday, GitLost prompt injection attack on GitHub's AI, Clacton by-election gets a three-party boycott, Farage's £5m reported to NCA, and Binface Watch begins.

title: The Morning Croak — 09 July 2026
excerpt: Binface breaks silence on Clacton: 'I didn't know old Farage was going to self-detonate', John Deere right to repair FTC settlement, Grok 4.5, TypeScript 7, Bun rewritten in Rust.
